calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph Bravo, of Bravo Law Offices, Tel. 415.512-6700, for plaintiffs Michelle Baker and David Banyard;
Ciaran O'Sullivan, of the Law Offices of Ciaran O'Sullivan, Tel. 415.391.3711, for defendant Pierre Andrada.

Ruling: The Court vacates its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PIERRE ANDRADA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. Counsel represents that a Request for Dismissal, without prejudice, has been filed and is pending with the court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Continued To Apr-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PIERRE ANDRADA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. A first amended complaint was filed January 24, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
